dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The air was thick with the scent of fear and ozone. Another beginning. Or was it just another end?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: How many times have I stood here? How many 'first floors' have I endured?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: A thousand? Ten thousand? The faces change, the screams echo differently, but the tower... it always remains.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Welcome, Player, to the Tutorial Tower!]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Your journey to become a true Awakened begins now.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Current Objective: Clear Floor 1 - The Goblin's Den.]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: The same old lines. The same old lies. A cruel mockery of hope for the unsuspecting.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Look at them. Fresh meat. Wide-eyed, trembling, clutching their rusty swords and dull axes as if they're holding onto life itself.

dialogue.speaker: New Player A
dialogue.line: G-Goblins?! They're everywhere! What are we supposed to do?!

dialogue.speaker: New Player B
dialogue.line: Someone help! My shield just... shattered! This isn't fair!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SCREAMS

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CLANG! CRACK! (Of a weak weapon breaking)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: This 'tutorial' is a cruel joke. A loop of despair for everyone but me. For them, it's a death sentence. For me... it's just another Tuesday.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: GOBLIN SNARL (A particularly large goblin charges)

dialogue.speaker: New Player C
dialogue.line: Agh! It's coming for me! I can't move!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: (He sighs, a barely perceptible movement, his gaze cold and distant.)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Enough. Let's get this over with. The faster I clear, the faster I can observe the changes.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! (Hyunsung moves, a blur of motion, too fast for the eye to follow)

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: THWACK! (A goblin's head explodes into green mist)

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACK! (Another goblin's neck snaps with a sickening sound)

dialogue.speaker: New Player A
dialogue.line: W-what was that?! Did... did someone just move?

dialogue.speaker: New Player B
dialogue.line: The goblins... they're all falling! Who's doing this?!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: They don't even see me. Good. Less hassle. My presence only complicates things for now.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SQUELCH (The final goblin falls, its body dissolving)

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have defeated the Goblin Chieftain!]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Floor 1 has been cleared!]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have gained 500 EXP.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have leveled up!]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have acquired the skill 'Basic Sword Mastery'.]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Basic Sword Mastery. Again. The irony never gets old, I suppose. A skill I mastered millennia ago.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: My true skills are beyond their comprehension. Beyond this 'tutorial' itself. They are forged in countless deaths and rebirths.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [All players will now be moved to Floor 2.]

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (A bright flash of light engulfs the players, transporting them)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Another floor. Another step closer. This time, I won't fail. I can't.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: This time, I will break the loop. I will escape this prison that has held me captive for so long.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: And I'll make sure no one else gets trapped here with me. Not again.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His eyes, ancient and weary, held a flicker of cold, unyielding determination. The advanced player had begun his final ascent.

summary: Kim Hyunsung, a veteran stuck in an endless loop within the Tutorial Tower, once again starts from Floor 1. He effortlessly dispatches the goblins, showcasing his overwhelming power and jaded perspective, while new players struggle, reaffirming his resolve to finally escape the tower and prevent others from being trapped.
